fields.description:
Pure/mechanical module-size split so `src/rebar/llm/plan_review/passes.py` (currently 930 LOC, over the 800 soft cap) graduates off the size gate. Extract the deterministic Pass-4 move-catalog CONTENT + the R6 advisory-triage stage into a NEW leaf sibling `src/rebar/llm/plan_review/coach_moves.py` along the Pass-4 boundary the module already carves.

This is a pure/mechanical refactor with NO signature or logic changes; E5 testing-plan is not-applicable — the existing test suites are the behavioral oracle.

## Seam (based on the code's current structure on origin/main)
MOVE by NAME: `MOVE_REGISTRY` (~lines 729-811), `load_move_registry` (~814-832), `APPLY_NOW_MARGIN` (~882-885), `triage_advisories` (~888-930) — ~160 LOC — into the NEW leaf. The leaf imports `rebar.llm.review_kernel` (for `validate_move_registry` + `DEFAULT_BLOCK_THRESHOLD`) PLUS stdlib `json` and `pathlib.Path` — the last two are needed by `load_move_registry`'s `.rebar/plan_review_moves.json` project-extension path (passes.py:826 uses `Path(...)`, passes.py:828 uses `json.loads(...)`). It holds NO back-reference to passes.py, so no import cycle is introduced. In passes.py the 4 symbols are re-imported from `.coach_moves` and re-exported (`# noqa: F401`) so `passes.<name>` and the `orchestrator.*` re-exports keep resolving; the now-unused `import json` and `from pathlib import Path` are removed from passes.py.

## Deviation from the docs/architecture.md offenders row (stated plainly per the phrasing rule)
The offenders-table row (docs/architecture.md ~line 272) names the coach cluster as `MOVE_REGISTRY`, `load_move_registry`, AND `pass4_coach` -> `coach_moves.py`. The target file name and the MOVE_REGISTRY/load_move_registry pair match the code, but the row is STALE on `pass4_coach`: `pass4_coach` CANNOT move — it builds a `RunRequest` through passes.py internals (`_resolve_system`, `PASS_COACH`), so relocating it would create a circular import (leaf -> passes). So `pass4_coach` STAYS in passes.py, and `triage_advisories` + `APPLY_NOW_MARGIN` (already deterministic, review_kernel-only) are moved instead to reach the cap. This ticket deletes that stale row.

## Back-compat consumers preserved
`orchestrator.py:87` (`from .passes import MOVE_REGISTRY, load_move_registry`), `workflow_ops.py` (`passes.load_move_registry`, `passes.triage_advisories`), and tests (`passes.MOVE_REGISTRY`, `passes.APPLY_NOW_MARGIN`, `passes.triage_advisories`, `orchestrator.MOVE_REGISTRY`/`orchestrator.load_move_registry`) all keep resolving via the re-exports.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] NEW `src/rebar/llm/plan_review/coach_moves.py` exists and is 100-800 LOC — verify: `n=$(wc -l < src/rebar/llm/plan_review/coach_moves.py); [ "$n" -ge 100 ] && [ "$n" -le 800 ]`
- [ ] coach_moves.py defines the 4 moved symbols — verify: `python -c "import rebar.llm.plan_review.coach_moves as m; [getattr(m,x) for x in ('MOVE_REGISTRY','load_move_registry','APPLY_NOW_MARGIN','triage_advisories')]"`
- [ ] coach_moves.py imports nothing from `rebar` outside `rebar.llm.review_kernel` (no back-ref to passes) — verify: `python -c "import ast; src=open('src/rebar/llm/plan_review/coach_moves.py').read(); bad=[m for n in ast.walk(ast.parse(src)) if isinstance(n,ast.ImportFrom) for m in [n.module or ''] if m.startswith('rebar') and not m.startswith('rebar.llm.review_kernel')]; assert not bad, bad"`
- [ ] passes.py is <= 800 LOC — verify: `[ "$(wc -l < src/rebar/llm/plan_review/passes.py)" -le 800 ]`
- [ ] passes.py re-exports the 4 moved symbols and orchestrator re-exports still resolve — verify: `python -c "import rebar.llm.plan_review.passes as p, rebar.llm.plan_review.orchestrator as o; [getattr(p,x) for x in ('MOVE_REGISTRY','load_move_registry','APPLY_NOW_MARGIN','triage_advisories')]; o.MOVE_REGISTRY; o.load_move_registry"`
- [ ] passes.py no longer imports json or pathlib.Path — verify: `! grep -qE '^import json|^from pathlib import Path' src/rebar/llm/plan_review/passes.py`
- [ ] passes.py removed from BOTH gate files — verify: `! grep -q 'plan_review/passes.py' .github/module-size-allowlist.txt && ! grep -q 'plan_review/passes.py' .github/module-size-ceilings.txt`
- [ ] passes.py remedy row deleted from docs/architecture.md offenders table — verify: `! grep -q 'plan_review/passes.py' docs/architecture.md`
- [ ] The module-size contract test passes (allowlist == over-cap set == ceilings keys) — verify: `python -m pytest tests/unit/test_module_size_contract.py -q`
- [ ] The named behavioral suites pass — verify: `python -m pytest tests/unit/test_plan_review_triage.py tests/unit/test_plan_review.py tests/unit/test_project_portability_coaching.py tests/unit/test_review_kernel.py tests/unit/test_plan_review_g7.py -q`
- [ ] `make lint` passes (ruff check + ruff format --check)
